### Update

Bumps the in-repo `$channel` packaging spec at `$spec_path` to release `v$version`.

This PR is auto-generated by the release workflow whenever a new tag lands on `main`. The change keeps the locally-maintained `$channel` definition in sync with the latest published artifact so users following the documented "build from the in-repo specs" install path get the current version.
